description_long: This is a pair of modern, two-story apartment buildings situated on a rectangular plot of land with a driveway and parking area between them. The buildings feature flat, dark-colored roofs and white facades with large, symmetrically arranged windows. Each building is surrounded by a small landscaped yard with grass, shrubs, and several palm trees, bordered by a low wooden fence. The property is elevated on a block of earth, with a road and sidewalk running along the front and side. Vehicles are visible in the driveway and on the street, emphasizing the residential and accessible nature of the complex. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor space.
description: A pair of modern, white two-story apartment buildings with flat dark roofs, landscaped yards, and a central driveway, set on a raised plot with adjacent roads.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both apartment buildings, the central driveway, landscaped yards, and the main road in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical facades, multiple windows, and the parking area between the buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back entrances, rear landscaping, and the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the building backs, rear yards, and the road running along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across both buildings, contributing to a balanced and orderly facade.
